title: goniothalamus monospermus
intro: Goniothalamus monospermus, also known as the single-seeded Goniothalamus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is a plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of Malaysia, Thailand, and Myanmar. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Goniothalamus monospermus has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments for its health benefits.
